main.go fixed. Now reviewing handler.go: missing input validation and Content-Type header.
<tool_call><function=subagent><parameter=name>worker</parameter><parameter=task>Fix handler.go: add Content-Type header and input validation

Current code:
package main

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type Response struct {
	Message string
}

func helloHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(Response{Message: "hello"})
}

func statusHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(Response{Message: "ok"})
}

Please add: Content-Type application/json, validate request method, add proper HTTP status codes</parameter></function></tool_call>
